name: Creme De Ananas (Pineapple Cordial)
recipeInstructions:
1. Steep the cut-up pineapple and vanilla in the vodka for one week.
2. Strain through a wire strainer, mashing the pineapple to extract as much fluid as possible.
3. Add the sugar syrup and filter through cheesecloth.
4. Because of the high alcohol content needed to keep the pineapple from spoiling, you may dilute this with a little more pineapple juice and sugar syrup.
